description_long: This bonsai features a slender, upright trunk with a natural, slightly irregular texture, resembling a young tree. The trunk is medium brown and appears to be made of wood, with subtle bends and a gentle taper as it rises. At the top, a modest canopy of green, elongated leaves forms a loose, umbrella-like cluster, with some smaller branches and leaves emerging lower on the trunk. The foliage is moderately dense, allowing glimpses of the trunk through the leaves, and the branches are arranged in a somewhat sparse, layered fashion. The overall silhouette is elegant and vertical, with a sense of natural growth rather than strict pruning. There is no visible pot or container at the base, suggesting the focus is on the tree itself.
description: A slender, upright bonsai with a medium brown, slightly curved trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green leaves forming a loose, umbrella-like top. The branches are sparse and layered, giving the tree an elegant, natural appearance.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen with its trunk slightly angled and the leafy canopy leaning to the left, showing a clear view of the main trunk and upper foliage.
description_view_1: This view highlights the verticality of the trunk and the spread of the upper branches, with the foliage appearing more evenly distributed across the top.
description_view_2: The trunk appears more slender and straight from this angle, with the canopy leaning to the right and some lower branches visible.
description_view_3: The bonsai is seen almost directly from the front, with the trunk centered and the foliage forming a symmetrical, umbrella-like shape at the top.
attribute_pot_type: No visible pot; the base of the trunk is exposed, suggesting the bonsai is either freestanding or the pot is not included in the view.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is mostly straight with a gentle, natural curve and slight taper, resembling the informal upright (Moyogi) bonsai style.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are sparsely arranged, with a layered structure and most foliage concentrated at the top, forming a loose, umbrella-like canopy.
attribute_leaf_density: Moderate; the foliage is neither sparse nor dense, allowing visibility of the trunk and branches through the leaves.
